creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
Larry, thanks for the patch. Please confirm these changes pass the QA (portlint, poudriere).

I would also recommend you add a comment to this patch so the next upstream version bump can be easier dealt with, having patches that explain themselves. You can copy the comments from upstream:

https://github.com/dovecot/core/commit/b284962364068d5e9d60b8b1e98ba61b4b6593ec.patch

(note the .patch ending to the URL).
